Parthenon built 5th century BCE, dedicated to Athena. Symbol of classical Greek civilization. Housed Athena Parthenos ivory/gold statue. Survived fires, religious conversions.
Parthenon influenced neoclassical architecture: US Capitol, British Museum, Melbourne Shrine, Nashville Parthenon (exact replica).
Koalas nearly entirely herbivorous, diet solely eucalyptus leaves. Special caecum digestive organ for fermentation. Home range 1-3 hectares, selective feeding on nutritious leaf tips.
Mallard ducks communicate via varied quacks: soft contact calls with mates, louder urgent calls for danger, raspy rattle during mating season for dominance display.
Ducks communicate via body language: head bobbing greeting, tail flicks excitement, wing flapping/puffing for courtship/dominance, soft muttering/whistles for bonding.
Got into Reddit discussion about social media impact on relationships. Interested in research on Facebook depression, social comparison, FOMO effects.
Facebook depression: feelings triggered by viewing others' curated lives, social comparison, unrealistic expectations, FOMO, reduced real-life connections.
Believes social media companies should improve design (screen time tracking), algorithmic transparency, mental health resources, content moderation, research collaboration.
Acknowledges features like screen time tracking and break suggestions help but limited effectiveness. Workarounds exist, onus on individuals, lacks transparency.
